title: Sophisticated Italian Chocolate Panettone
description: A kid-friendly Italian dessert featuring plain chocolate and a light, airy texture, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: In a large lacquerware bowl, combine flour, sugar, and yeast.
In a separate bowl, whisk together warm water, eggs, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and fold in the chocolate chips and vanilla extract.
Shape the dough into a panettone form and place it in a greased lacquerware bowl.
Bake the panettone for 35 minutes or until it is golden brown.
Let the panettone cool in the bowl for 10 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
